title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For November 2022

title: McCormick & Company: Key Takeaways From The Latest Earnings
text: Increasing sales, but declining demand in the EMEA and Asia/Pacific regions. Increasing costs have resulted in contracting margins and lower net income than in the year ago quarter.

title: McCormick (MKC) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: McCormick (MKC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.15% and 0.33%, respectively, for the quarter ended August 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: McCormick's stock set to fall after profit miss as margins contracted
text: Shares of McCormick & Co. Inc. MKC, -1.50% were indicated down less than 1% in premarket trading Thursday, after the spices and seasonings mix company reported fiscal third-quarter profit that fell short of expectations, amid continued supply chain challenges and as recovery of certain constrained materials took longer than anticipated. Net income rose to $222.9 million, or 82 cents a share, from $212.4 million, or 79 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: McCormick Is Facing Headwinds
text: McCormick & Co. Inc. ( MKC , Financial) is a global food company that specializes in spices, seasoning mixes and condiments.
